revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-3-055

The forming of signals (such as those employed in a telegraph transmission) by the modulation of a direct current or other carrier between discrete values of some characteristic.
